programme.title: Lemon Cafe

programme.title: Shipwreck
programme.desc: Benjamin and Hettie find an old treasure map that leads to Blue Whiskers' Pirate Shipwreck! They ask Stanley to help them find it and maybe bring it back to show the townsfolk.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Stanley needs to do some jobs for the community, but all his vehicles are out of power due to a cloud of butterflies obscuring them and he needs to figure out how to move them.

programme.title: That Is SO Bad!
programme.desc: From being cheeky-like eating lots of sweets or watching TV when you're not supposed to-the funny animals chat about what it's like to misbehave.

programme.title: It's time to look at old pictures
programme.desc: A photo of Gran Gran and JoJo's mummy when she was a little girl inspires them to take a walk and compare old photos of their neighbourhood to see how it has changed over time.

programme.title: Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: The Get Indoors Badge
programme.desc: A weather warning from Duggee's barometer leads the Squirrels to round up the creatures.

programme.title: The Camouflage Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a chameleon called Cosey and learn about blending into surroundings.

programme.title: Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Sea Arch Escape
programme.desc: Xuli's flying race around the Academy inspires cadet Tala to fly the Grimbler. But she crashes into a fragile sea arch that could collapse right on top of her!

programme.title: Mango
programme.desc: It's wish-granter Mango, ready to make all the Roots and Fruits cast wishes come true.

programme.title: Fig
programme.desc: It's the nicest, kindest, Fig, performing his song, "Just Can't Help Being Sweet!"

programme.title: Ahoy Captain Pak Choi
programme.desc: Supertato and Broccoli go on a pirate adventure with Captain Pak Choi, but they don't realise she intends on plundering Evil Pea's freezer and stealing all her shiny things.

programme.title: Veg-O-Vision Song Contest
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team must battle to save Tato Tower from Evil Pea's earth-shaking stomping performance at the Veg-O-Vision Song Contest.

programme.title: Running Around in Circles
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po run around in circles in Home Dome. The Noo-Noo joins in and the Teletubbies have fun chasing.

programme.title: Hedgehog
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `hedgehog', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today we meet lots of hedgehogs: a brown hedgehog, a small hedgehog, a snuffling hedgehog and a hungry hedgehog.

programme.title: Sleepless in OKIDO
programme.desc: It's the Great OKIDO Sleepover, but there is a loud noise keeping Messy awake.

programme.title: Cherry Picker!
programme.desc: The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.

programme.title: Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: The Blarney Stone, Ireland
programme.desc: Kyan has to use some smooth talking to save the tourists and protect Blarney Castle.

programme.title: Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get Daddy Robot to do it. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot malfunctions!

programme.title: Stumpfest
programme.desc: Dad and his mates hit the backyard, ready to rip up some tree stumps! But when Bluey and Bingo take over a stump as a nail salon, Dad finds he's got some negotiating to do.

programme.title: Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Andy and the Baby European Pond Turtle
programme.desc: In this episode, Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the Danube river in Vienna, Austria on a baby animal mission to help a newly hatched European pond turtle reach water. Along the way, the intrepid team witness the emergence of ten million mayflies.

programme.title: Ball
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: The Stick Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: The Colour Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is painting in his favourite colouring book. The Squirrels want to have a go too.

programme.title: The Harvest Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is getting ready to harvest the ripe crops that grown. The squirrels remember when they planted their seeds, watered them, and left them to grow, and now it's time to help Duggee pick them all.

programme.title: Cave of Crystals, Mexico
programme.desc: Can Glitch be saved from the Cave of Crystals, Mexico before things get too hot to handle?

programme.title: The Great Little Railway Show

programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team must battle to save Tato Tower from Evil Pea's earth-shaking stomping performance at the Veg-O-Vision Song Contest.

programme.desc: Evil Pea lures Supertato and Tomato into her cave of frosted doom. Can they find the courage to avoid her traps and retrieve The Lost Candle of Birthdays for Tomato's Museum?

programme.title: Running Around in Circles
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po run around in circles in Home Dome. The Noo-Noo joins in and the Teletubbies have fun chasing.

programme.title: Hedgehog
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `hedgehog', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today we meet lots of hedgehogs: a brown hedgehog, a small hedgehog, a snuffling hedgehog and a hungry hedgehog.

programme.title: Sleepless in OKIDO
programme.desc: It's the Great OKIDO Sleepover, but there is a loud noise keeping Messy awake.

programme.title: Cherry Picker!
programme.desc: The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.

programme.title: Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: The Blarney Stone, Ireland
programme.desc: Kyan has to use some smooth talking to save the tourists and protect Blarney Castle.

programme.title: Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get Daddy Robot to do it. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot malfunctions!

programme.title: Stumpfest
programme.desc: Dad and his mates hit the backyard, ready to rip up some tree stumps! But when Bluey and Bingo take over a stump as a nail salon, Dad finds he's got some negotiating to do.

programme.title: Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Andy and the Baby European Pond Turtle
programme.desc: In this episode, Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the Danube river in Vienna, Austria on a baby animal mission to help a newly hatched European pond turtle reach water. Along the way, the intrepid team witness the emergence of ten million mayflies.

programme.title: Ball
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: The Stick Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: The Colour Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is painting in his favourite colouring book. The Squirrels want to have a go too.

programme.title: The Harvest Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is getting ready to harvest the ripe crops that grown. The squirrels remember when they planted their seeds, watered them, and left them to grow, and now it's time to help Duggee pick them all.

programme.title: Bishop Rock Lighthouse, Isles of Scilly
programme.desc: Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.title: Cave of Crystals, Mexico
programme.desc: Can Glitch be saved from the Cave of Crystals, Mexico before things get too hot to handle?

programme.title: The Great Little Railway Show
programme.desc: When a Railway Show for little engines comes to Sodor, an overly excited Percy finally sees his chance to shine.

programme.title: Lemon Cafe
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck discover a Lemon Cafe in the park, but it seems to be nearly closing time...

programme.title: Star Renovation
programme.desc: Venus has attempted to redecorate the night sky, but now Sarah can't find any of her favourite constellations...

programme.title: Den
programme.desc: Little Woo and Seamus call Stanley to help them build a den so they can watch the bugs in the forest without disturbing them. Stanley builds a giant, camouflaged den on legs.

programme.title: Shipwreck
programme.desc: Benjamin and Hettie find an old treasure map that leads to Blue Whiskers' Pirate Shipwreck! They ask Stanley to help them find it and maybe bring it back to show the townsfolk.

programme.title: Your Brother is Really Naughty
programme.desc: The talking animals chat about all the good and bad things about having a brother or a sister.

programme.title: It's time to dance

programme.title: Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on an adventure to find a famously shy creature.

programme.title: The Get Indoors Badge

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: K-1 World Max 2025 -70kg Opening Rounds
programme.desc: K-1 World MAX returns from Tokyo, Japan, highlighted by the -70kg World Championship Tournament opening round, and two Championship bouts. For the K-1 World GP Super Bantamweight Championship, Kaneko Akihiro (26-3) meets Koji Ikeda (16-7), and also on the card is a Women's Atomweight Championship bout between Matsutani Kira (13-1) and Akira Suematsu (8-1). Don't miss a stacked night of fights - K-1 World Max on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 3 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA Jarno Nurminen vs. Sang Soo Lee
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Heavyweights Jarno Nurminen and Sang Soo Lee look to make waves in St. Petersburg, Russia for this one.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Shane Mosley vs. Luis Collazo
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights 'Sugar' Shane Mosley (43-4, 37 KOs) and Luis Collazo (27-2, 13 KOs) fighting over the interim WBC title. This fight took place at the Mandalay Bay Resort and Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA, on February 10, 2007.

programme.desc: Every Grand Designs project has its challenges, and the triangle house in Billingshurst, West Sussex, certainly had its fair share. It saw one of the trickiest plots ever seen on the show.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off (S10)
programme.desc: It's Biscuit Day and the bakers recreate their favourite bedtime stories in biscuit form.

programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy jarred-pepper pasta, crispy chicken in baked-bread sauce, and a beef brisket traybake - all prepped in minutes. He makes shelf-raid spiced haricot beans, and rounds it all off with a fast and simple strawberry & balsamic tart.

programme.title: Nigellissima (S1)
programme.desc: Nigella shares the secrets of her celebratory, yet simple Italian roast chicken, served alongside a sunny saffron orzotto.

programme.title: The Wow Factor
programme.desc: Rachel serves up a chocolate-lover's ice cream dream, makes chocolate bread, and visits London to sample chocolate from around the world.

programme.title: Hong Kong
programme.desc: Josie heads to Hong Kong, flying first class to stay at the Rosewood Hotel where she has her own butler! She also heads out on a luxury yacht to see the region's many islands, and enjoys cocktails.

programme.title: Shop, Monmouthshire
programme.desc: George Clarke meets Kirsti and Tim who are converting a Grade 2 listed shop in Monmouth town centre, giving it a new lease of quirky life.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee (S11)
programme.desc: It's Reduce, Reuse, Recycle week, with sewers creating a zero-waste jacket, transforming discarded tents and, inspired by the Make Do and Mend campaign, raiding wardrobes to create new outfits.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars (S2)
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tasks his contenders to scale 40-foot-tall trees to collect pines to infuse into Michelin-starred millefeuille. Who will step up?

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: After being wrongfully convicted of murder, Monica has finally been proven innocent. All charges have been dropped and the police have shifted their focus to Simone, their number-one person of interest.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Balsamic & Soy Braised Brisket & Apple Honey Cake
programme.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programme.title: Spaghetti & Meatballs
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up her family's favourite version of spaghetti and meatballs with a Tuscan flair.

programme.title: Dill Popcorn Shrimp
programme.desc: Rachael has always dreamed of creating her own line of flavoured popcorn. She incorporates her favourite flavour combinations in a crowd-pleasing recipe for dill popcorn shrimp.

MasterChef legend Daren Purchese returns with his toughest challenge yet. Darren's exquisite Cherry Blossom dessert will push the novice cooks to their limits as they try to replicate it in four hours.
Pantoh is a Taiwanese dining experience where guests enjoy exquisite dishes in open-air venues. Chef Ah-yong showcases an emblematic dish of pantoh cuisine: calamari, sea snail, and leek soup.

programme.title: Vegetarian Feast
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to prepare a meat-free holiday meal that everyone will love! First, she makes a flavourful soup using Italian pumpkins. Next, she prepares her family's traditional "Holiday Stars".

programme.title: La French Touch
programme.desc: Sebastien Martin and his friend Chef Francois Audrin travel through Kochi Prefecture, visiting local farms and wineries, discovering inspiration from the producers' commitment and unique food culture.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2: Simone's Revenge
programme.desc: After escaping the murderous clutches of Simone, Monica is making a fresh start as the host of a primetime TV program. Simone, suffering from amnesia, sees Monica on TV, her memories come rushing back.

programme.title: There's A New Killer In Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. The two become fast friends, but soon Holly, another of Alice's friends, suspects there is more to Ronnie than meets the eye.
From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

The Dokbakz are in Australia, and it's time to feast on some meat! For dinner, they head to a famous restaurant known for its ribs. But before that, they start their second day in Sydney at Rocks Market.

programme.title: Tampa: 58th Avenue
programme.desc: The zombie team has their work cut out for them when they discover a 3bed/2bath might be missing a bedroom! Termites, collapsing ceilings and some surprises might just be a budget-buster!
Eight eliminated contestants return for the chance to cook their way back into the competition. They have 75 minutes to cook a winning dish with a herb allocated at random.
Taiwanese cuisine boasts wide variations of chicken soup, and Chef A-lin has a special recipe. Learn more about how Chef A-lin creates the most complex flavor with the most elegant approach.

programme.title: Schnitzel Sandwich Celery Root Remoulade & Chocolate Chip Cookie Brittle
programme.desc: Taking inspiration from one of his husband's favourite dishes as a child, Jake makes celery-root remoulade and adds a European twist to the fried chicken sandwich.

programme.title: Tuscan Ribollita
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her take on ribollita, a traditional Italian soup loaded with beans, greens, and mushrooms, served with toasted Tuscan bread.

programme.title: Dallas: Westwood
programme.desc: Derek gets a new property for $.50 on the dollar, which makes him confident that nothing could possibly go wrong. But when they face the worst rat and roach infestation, their hopes quickly turn to fears.

programme.title: Armenian Easter
programme.desc: Rachael loves Armenian food and shows how to prepare a traditional Armenian Easter feast of stuffed cabbage rolls, baked rainbow trout and sweet and savoury glazed fruit and potatoes.

With high expectations, the Dokbakz arrive in Australia, where nature and art coexist. After landing at Sydney Airport, they are eager to explore one of the city's most famous landmarks: the Opera House.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: When Michael, an older single man looking for companionship, falls for alluring psychic Janis, she sees him as an easy mark. But will Janis be exposed by Virginia, Michael's concerned relative?

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: 全民星攻略

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CHEF TAMPAN MANISNYA WAGELASIH
programme.desc: Determined to reach her dreams in a male-dominated industry, Eka goes undercover as a man just to attend an exclusive class led by a world-renowned chef.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Adik Ipar Tidak Maut Tapi Akut
programme.desc: Febi (Raisya Bawazier) moves in with her older sister, but her presence creates tension as she is wrongly labeled as a 'sister-in-law from hell.' Little does the sister know, Febi’s distraction isn't malice-she’s secretly falling for her cousin-in-law, Edgar (Dylan Carr).

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: BUKAN MAIN, NENG KUE CUBIT TAJIR MENDADAK
programme.desc: Choosing a life of simplicity with her father, Yulina must learn to find happiness while selling kue cubit (traditional bite-sized cakes) on the street. Can she find contentment in the little things despite her struggles?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ganteng Sih Tapi Sayang Udah Makan Belum?
programme.desc: Bella (Ochi Rosdiana), a wealthy and beautiful girl, steps out of an ATM only to be knocked over by Ahong (El Ryan Carlen), who is sprinting away from a persistent admirer named Wina. Bella is furious and berates him, but Ahong doesn't look back, leaving Bella fuming in the street.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: TITIP RINDU BUAT TUKANG CUKUR
programme.desc: Isah (Andi Viola) is a humble barber who considers herself plain and overweight, while her sister Sofi is a stunning beauty. Despite their differences, both sisters find themselves falling for the same man, Bayu (Qausar Harta). Surprisingly, it's the quirky Isah who seems to attract all the attention.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA DITOLAK SEBLAK BERTINDAK
programme.desc: After being dumped and betrayed by her best friend, Larasati drowns her sorrows in an extreme amount of spicy seblak. Her spicy binge-eating goes too far, leading her to faint and wake up in an unexpected situation.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jika Harimu Berat Ngopi Dulu Bolo

programme.desc: 在亚、欧、美三大洲拥有直播站和全球完善报导网络，又有众多驻外记者和阵容鼎盛的主播，收看凤凰卫视便俨如坐上一列资讯直通车。直通车为您送上当日各地头条要闻。

programme.title: 总编辑时间 (8/5/26)
programme.desc: 由凤凰卫视资深评论员重点编选和剖析一天世界最值得注意的头条新闻，解构事情的来龙去脉和对日后发展的重要性，让观众可以深度了解一天的重点事项。

programme.title: 新闻今日谈 (8/5/26)
programme.desc: 此节目针对每天最热门的时事话题，在观众最关注的时刻即时作出评论，让观众更洞悉事件的真相。

programme.title: 凤凰焦点新闻 (8/5/26)
programme.desc: 《凤凰焦点新闻》准时、及时、简明、迅速地为您追踪全球各个角落最有价值、新鲜热辣的新闻大事。

programme.title: 总编辑时间 (8/5/26)

programme.title: Spin The Bottle
programme.desc: When friends play spin the bottle in a house marked by a massacre, they unleash an evil spirit and start dying in terrifying ways.

programme.title: Path To War
programme.desc: President Johnson and his foreign-policy team struggle with the decision to end the Vietnam war in this HBO Original film.

programme.title: Life Support
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Life Support tells the tale of an HIV-positive woman who learns lessons of love and strength through helping others.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Maverick joins forces with a lady gambler to enter a Winner-Takes-All poker game.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Escape From L.A.
programme.desc: Ex-convict Kurt Russell (who else!) battles his way through the hellholes of Los Angeles to retrieve a doomsday weapon.

programme.title: Kiss The Girls
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman is hunting down a serial killer, and his only clue is Ashley Judd, the only victim who managed to get away.

programme.title: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The story of Winston Churchill unfolds in this award winning HBO Original Movie.
In the summer of 1961, two baseball players and best friends compete to beat the home run record set by legendary Babe Ruth in 1927.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: In the second of the blockbuster Batman films, the physically deformed criminal genius The Penguin threatens Gotham City. Helpless, the entire city can only pray that Batman Returns.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: It's double trouble when Batman takes on Two-Face and the Riddler. Stars Val Kilmer, Chris O'Donnell, Nicole Kidman, Tommy Lee Jones and Jim Carrey.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Cinta Abang Tamvan Pantang Disayurin
programme.desc: Nando (Morgan Oey) helps Sesil (Rayna Snova), who is about to be sold abroad. Nando asks his mother for permission to let Sesil stay at her house.

programme.title: Sudah Jatuh Ketiban Duren Iya Lagi Iya Lagi
programme.desc: Juna, a durian tycoon who owns a durian orchard, meets Ambar, unaware that Juna is the boss of the durian orchard that Ambar is looking after. Juna, who is sick because it's his first time working in the field, doesn't get any attention from Maya. But suddenly Maya cheats on him with Aldo. Juna, who finds out, is disappointed with Maya.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Kalung Bisa Dicari Tapi Yang Tulus Tak Datang Dua Kali
programme.desc: A girl named Naura (Larasati Nugroho) desperately needs a job to meet her daily needs. Every company that opens a job always turns her down because her appearance is considered unattractive due to her acne.

programme.title: Lelepati Adalah Komunikasi Cinta Yang Hakiki
programme.desc: It tells the story of a beautiful girl named Tiara. It is said that Tiara did not study seriously while in college. This made Tiara's parents angry, so she was sent to her grandmother's village to take care of catfish. Tiara, who had to adapt to the new environment in the village, also had to respect Jaya, who often annoyed her. Even Jaya also received support from Tiara's grandmother. So why did Tiara suddenly start to like Jaya?

programme.title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
programme.desc: Ilamathi is stuck between a brave cop and a bad goon. This love triangle is dangerous. Can her heart handle the trouble? She must choose between the two men.

programme.title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare - Oru Chinanjiru Kuyilin Kadhai
programme.desc: A poetic drama about love, memory, and childhood emotions as characters grow. Simple moments reveal how love shapes memory, guiding growth through tender, evolving feelings.

programme.title: Mahanadhi Sagodharigalin Kadhai
programme.desc: When a family loses their father, the sole member of their lives, they take it as a challenge to rise back stronger in all situations.

programme.title: Sindhu Bairavi Kacheri Arambam
programme.desc: For her father's word, Bairavi ties the knot with Arumugam, while Siva rejects Sindhu's proposal yet ends up marrying her. How will these couples find solace?

programme.title: Thaai Maman- Thaiku Nigaranavan
programme.desc: The story follows family members facing duties, sacrifices, and emotions as they strive to stay united despite conflicts and hardships testing their bond and resilience.

programme.title: Siragadikka Aasai
programme.desc: Meena and Muthukumar, both carrying emotional baggage, struggle through challenges in their marriage due to their troubled backgrounds.

programme.title: Chinna Marumagal Panirendaam Vaguppu

programme.title: Jade the Juggler

programme.title: To Tell The Truth
programme.desc: A writer, a Marine, and a rising pop star are involved in a night of mayhem.

programme.title: 玉罗刹
programme.desc: 故事描述，每逢恐怖歌声出现，必有阎家的人被署名「玉罗刹」者所杀。由于「玉罗刹」神出鬼没，闹得满城风雨。冷秋寒于酒馆遇见徐英豪，交谈下，知彼也为寻仇而来；冷直告自己实为「玉罗刹」，杀阎家为替全家报仇，徐劝其勿滥杀无辜，冷不听...

programme.title: 遗产五亿圆
programme.desc: 故事讲述三女意外获得大笔财产，必须远赴日本领取，途中遇上三位男人，也想分一杯羹。正当大家各怀鬼胎，彼此攻击、贿赂甚至出卖对方，企图独占钜款时，殊不知更惊悚的遭遇正严阵以待。

programme.title: 82家房客
programme.desc: 延续经典喜剧《72家房客》的成功，本片讲述一羣住在香港唐楼的租客被发展商强行迫迁的故事。有些租客愿意接受金钱赔偿，但有些却坚决反对。收购计划最终又会否破坏邻里间的和谐？

programme.title: 血芙蓉
programme.desc: 故事描述清帝雍正为了巩固统治地位，组织了一暗杀集团「血滴子」，为他杀害异见分子。时有一清廷侍卫统领韩天德者，因不值雍正所为而遭杀害，幸其妻容秋燕适不在家，幸免于难，容悲愤莫名，独闯「血滴子」统领金罡风家，为夫报仇，终行刺失败而回。后得弃暗投明之前「血滴子」成员马腾及其师弟王俊相助，合三人之力终将金罡风杀死，替夫报仇。

programme.title: 女子公寓
programme.desc: 故事背景为一幢女子公寓，房东陈太太痛恨男人，严禁男性进入，不幸，女房客却多靠男性而活；歌女尤淑文由台北飞到香港，找寻失踪的妹妹；尤经作曲家王德生介绍到居所楼上之女子公寓居住...

programme.title: 洪拳大师
programme.desc: 广东十虎之首的铁桥三为人景仰，拥有徒弟无数。当时达官贵人都以吸食鸦片为时尚，而铁桥三亦随俗吸食，身子因此渐受毒害。后来，铁桥三更被烟馆主人击败，幸得徒弟舍身相救，他才不致丧命。于是，铁桥三决心戒掉鸦片，重新振作。

programme.title: 爱的世界
programme.desc: 李子良丧妻后，与两个儿子相依为命。妻子的巨额医药费令子良经济十分拮据，受同事教唆往马场孤注一掷，迫得向高利贷借款，从此子良债台高筑，疲于奔命，没有时间与儿子沟通，父子疏离。与此同时高利贷不断登门恐吓，骚扰儿子，最终弄至悲剧发生...

programme.title: 金衣大侠
programme.desc: 故事讲述女侠俞飞霞，被武林盟主误会她是运用「黑沙掌」，偷去神功宝书的蒙面少女。于是她女扮男装，混入少林寺暗中查探真相...

programme.title: 扭计祖宗陈梦吉
programme.desc: 华南影帝张瑛与梁天合作的清末喜剧，二人分饰师爷荒唐镜及奇人陈梦吉。陈得知荒平素极尽敛财害人之能事，遂乔扮应征仆人...

programme.title: 游侠儿
programme.desc: 武功高强的游侠儿游戏人间，劫富济贫，往往连自已的银子都散给灾民。一日，他遇上一班强盗，打算抢劫一个正在保运一批价值连城珍宝的护卫。最初游被他们欺骗一起劫镖，但他在发觉后誓要进行报复。

programme.title: 蓝与黑
programme.desc: 抗日战争期间，少年孤女唐琪爱上青年张醒亚。家庭的压力与战争的动荡令这对有情人饱受煎熬。直至唐琪不幸被强奸，不容于家庭, 而唯有走上夜总会歌女的不归路...

programme.title: 少年苏乞儿
programme.desc: 苏灿是酒庄老板的长子，生性潇洒不羁，在被学校开除后，被迫接受家中安排的私人教师指导。没想到这位教师竟是一位身怀绝技的武术大师，苏灿因此拜入其门下，展开严格的修炼。然而，当家人与师父惨遭冷血悍匪「蜈蚣」杀害后，苏灿踏上了一场生死难料的复仇之路。

programme.title: 阿牛入城记
programme.desc: 这部喜剧描述乡下人阿牛来港后，因生性戆直而经常被坏人利用。阿牛尝尽低下层社会的人情冷暖，最后更被判入狱！究竟天生乐观的他，能否吉人天相？

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜在彧修明下山求援期间，坚守枕霞山并成功抵御蔡骖的围攻。在危机时刻，彧修明及时归来，救下了准备自尽的叶凌霜。之后，叶凌霜利用自己的影响力，为叛军家属求情，使彧修明赦免了他们。在前往闵中山的途中，叶凌霜被人推下藤桥，但幸得彧修明相救。在一次意外中，叶凌霜进入了一个法阵，得知了彧修明身世的秘密和他的使命。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】宇泽被一妍勒令停职，丽雪以董事会主席的投票作交换，希望一妍帮助宇泽。明塱医院实行优化计划，结果引发职员罢工抗议！工潮期间，董事袁添维的大哥心脏病入院、丽雪招待基金会重要捐款人到访、启心的男友亦谦苏醒等重要大事接连出现。一妍怀疑有黑手于背后推动工潮，而黑手竟是以珈与德桥，以珈还凭此事令杏芳答应在选董事会主席时投其一票。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜在彧修明下山求援期间，坚守枕霞山并成功抵御蔡骖的围攻。在危机时刻，彧修明及时归来，救下了准备自尽的叶凌霜。之后，叶凌霜利用自己的影响力，为叛军家属求情，使彧修明赦免了他们。在前往闵中山的途中，叶凌霜被人推下藤桥，但幸得彧修明相救。在一次意外中，叶凌霜进入了一个法阵，得知了彧修明身世的秘密和他的使命。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈对策动工潮酿成不幸，十分后悔。方欣以董事会代表身分负责彻查，一妍了然方欣目的是阻止她竞逐明塱主席。以珈终发现海淳患上家族性遗传病，懊悔自己为了选主席，忽略了海淳。一妍答应与以珈一起照顾海淳。海淳的生母曾筱蕙回港探望海淳，原来是以珈安排让海淳圆愿。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶和界诸婴决定成亲，他们的婚礼得到了彧修明的支持。同时，彧修明放出羽人的踏白，试图找出羽人余孽。叶凌霜回朝后开始研究岁正法阵，希望借助它回到过去。在云纹的帮助下，她开启了法阵并看到了七海蕊从若感峰掉下去的过去影像。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: Violence in the kitchen, the end of silence
programme.desc: In gastronomy, a belief persists: to become a great chef, you must suffer. A rule that justifies moral, sometimes physical, violence and all kinds of humiliations. We investigated behind the scenes of Michelin-starred restaurants-a highly competitive world where every blow seems allowed.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Johanna Tordjman (Algeria/Tunisia)
programme.desc: A French artist of Algerian and Tunisian origins, it was the death of her grandmother that triggered her artistic gesture. Johanna Tordjman had to paint in order not to forget. Drawing on photographic archives, she chose to tell, through brushstrokes, the stories of heritage, immigration and the invisible memories of contemporary France.

programme.title: Gotha
programme.desc: A general overview of European and world monarchies, through an issue of the moment, a particular focus, an encounter or a trend, plus one right royal question, asked by Ange-Victoria!

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Interweaving treasures
programme.desc: Centovalli and a thousand stories: from the valley of the chimney sweeps to the little emigrant cathedral in Palagnedra, crossing a bridge that has miraculously withstood time and floods.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: The Denkyra
programme.desc: Pokou sees Amouble trying to pick a mango. Pokou wants to help her pick the fruit but Amouble blocks her attempts.

programme.title: The microphone
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique

programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Petit Frere
programme.desc: Rose leaves the Ivory Coast for France with her two sons, Jean and Ernest. The single mother gets a job as a chambermaid and struggles every day to keep her family afloat. As teenagers and then young adults, Jean and Ernest are confronted by the difficulties of integration.

programme.title: Finding myself again
programme.desc: While Leon is finishing the first draft of his novel, Ricardo continues to miss his classes. His parents have to intervene to get him to straighten himself out. Doris' help may prove useful...

programme.title: Take care of me
programme.desc: Francis and Julietta are getting married! Leon discovers the cover for his novel. Things are not getting any better for Ricardo, who manages to alienate his best friend. Florence's health takes a turn for the worse...

programme.title: Why me and not someone else?
programme.desc: It's the day of the wedding and everyone is there with Francis and Julietta to celebrate their marriage. Love is in the air... Ricardo and Doris are closer than ever. While Florence's state of health continues to decline, an important call interrupts the festivities...

programme.title: Coast

programme.title: Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: Asia has the longest coastline of any continent and the earth's richest coral reefs. This episode explores Asia's waters, as spectacular as they are diverse, and never-seen-before animal behaviour.

programme.title: The Frozen North
programme.desc: In the remote reaches of Asia's frozen north, creatures must overcome unique challenges, finding exceptional ways to thrive in a hostile world that pushes life to its very limits.

programme.title: Tangled Worlds
programme.desc: Asia's jungles are beautiful and exceptionally diverse, but whilst they provide shelter, food and opportunity, they are also full of dangers and hidden threats.

programme.title: Crowded Continent
programme.desc: In the planet's most densely populated continent, animals live at extremely close quarters with people, from tigers making a home in town to elephants stopping traffic for food.

programme.title: The Arid Heart
programme.desc: In the heart of Asia lie vast arid lands. These deserts and dry grasslands are so hostile, they push life to the limit. The animals that live here are some of the earth's toughest.

programme.title: Saving Asia
programme.desc: Many passionate people are dedicated to saving the wild animals of Asia. These individuals and their ingenious solutions give us hope and optimism for the future of the continent.

programme.title: Wild London

programme.title: Making Life on Earth: Attenborough's Greatest Adventure
programme.desc: To mark his 100th birthday, David Attenborough reflects on a remarkable life. SInce his first broadcast more than 70 years ago, Attenborough has helped reshape our understanding of the natural world.

programme.title: Food Factory (S2)

programme.title: Mizuho Americas Open Round 1
programme.desc: The Mizuho Americas Open is a women's professional golf tournament on the LPGA Tour held at Liberty National Golf Club in Jersey City, New Jersey. It is a fairly new tournament on the LPGA Tour with the inaugural event making its debut back in June 2023. It has a prize fund of $3 million, among the highest on tour for a non-major event.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜在彧修明下山求援期间，坚守枕霞山并成功抵御蔡骖的围攻。在危机时刻，彧修明及时归来，救下了准备自尽的叶凌霜。之后，叶凌霜利用自己的影响力，为叛军家属求情，使彧修明赦免了他们。在前往闵中山的途中，叶凌霜被人推下藤桥，但幸得彧修明相救。在一次意外中，叶凌霜进入了一个法阵，得知了彧修明身世的秘密和他的使命。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】宇泽被一妍勒令停职，丽雪以董事会主席的投票作交换，希望一妍帮助宇泽。明塱医院实行优化计划，结果引发职员罢工抗议！工潮期间，董事袁添维的大哥心脏病入院、丽雪招待基金会重要捐款人到访、启心的男友亦谦苏醒等重要大事接连出现。一妍怀疑有黑手于背后推动工潮，而黑手竟是以珈与德桥，以珈还凭此事令杏芳答应在选董事会主席时投其一票。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜在彧修明下山求援期间，坚守枕霞山并成功抵御蔡骖的围攻。在危机时刻，彧修明及时归来，救下了准备自尽的叶凌霜。之后，叶凌霜利用自己的影响力，为叛军家属求情，使彧修明赦免了他们。在前往闵中山的途中，叶凌霜被人推下藤桥，但幸得彧修明相救。在一次意外中，叶凌霜进入了一个法阵，得知了彧修明身世的秘密和他的使命。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈对策动工潮酿成不幸，十分后悔。方欣以董事会代表身分负责彻查，一妍了然方欣目的是阻止她竞逐明塱主席。以珈终发现海淳患上家族性遗传病，懊悔自己为了选主席，忽略了海淳。一妍答应与以珈一起照顾海淳。海淳的生母曾筱蕙回港探望海淳，原来是以珈安排让海淳圆愿。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶和界诸婴决定成亲，他们的婚礼得到了彧修明的支持。同时，彧修明放出羽人的踏白，试图找出羽人余孽。叶凌霜回朝后开始研究岁正法阵，希望借助它回到过去。在云纹的帮助下，她开启了法阵并看到了七海蕊从若感峰掉下去的过去影像。

programme.desc: The World Snooker Championship is the most prestigious and longest-running professional snooker tournament, established in 1927. programme.title: Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Tuskist / Three Moon Festival
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first "tuskist" appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Easter Kitty Bunny
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Sick Day
programme.desc: When the other dragons come down with the flu, Summer must overcome her fear of eels to retrieve the cure and get her friends back in the air.

programme.title: Bad Egg
programme.desc: Magnus hatches a plan to hide in an egg to spy on the Rescue Riders. But things get all scrambled when a mama dragon takes him to her nest.

programme.title: Gopher it! / A Glamping We Will Go
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.title: Catch that Drone / The Fairy of the Teeth
programme.desc: When Harper's drone flies away it’s up to the Dew Drops to get it back. And while Eden wishes she could fly like a drone, she learns that she can do great things with or without wings. / When Dylan loses his first tooth the Dew Drops learn that the Tooth Fairy will be coming and Athena tries so hard to make a good impression that she almost ruins Dylan's first lost tooth experience.

programme.title: Ding Dong Day \ Grand Sam
programme.desc: It’s Pawston’s annual Take Your Kid to Work Day, and it’s Tag’s year to spend the day at the Doorbell Store with Paw. \ Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to complete an obstacle course in the woods.

programme.title: Clucky Day \ Take Me Out to the Fetch Game
programme.desc: Scooch is bummed out because he’s missing his favorite holiday back in his old farm town, so Tag wants to cheer him up by rounding up some chickens and bringing Clucky Day to Pawston. \ When there’s a schedule mix-up and the Pawston Get Sox players think they have a day off, it’s up to Tag and Scooch to round up all five players in time for the fetch game, so that they don’t have to forfeit.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Easter Kitty Bunny
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: She Said, She Said / Starfish
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Leroy’s Caterpillar / Lost Spark
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Sick Day
programme.desc: When the other dragons come down with the flu, Summer must overcome her fear of eels to retrieve the cure and get her friends back in the air.

programme.title: Bad Egg
programme.desc: Magnus hatches a plan to hide in an egg to spy on the Rescue Riders. But things get all scrambled when a mama dragon takes him to her nest.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Ton-Ton's dreams come true when the Trux build hang-gliding wings to rescue the Ottos, but when he crashes it's up to Dozer to fly the rescue mission

programme.title: Lucky and the Escape Artist
programme.desc: Soon-to-be-big sister Lucky "borrows" Snips for a day to see what it’s like to have a little sibling, but nothing goes as planned

programme.title: Do-Over
programme.desc: Frustrated with life in the future, Cleo attempts to use Brian’s untested time machine to return to ancient Egypt. In the process, she ends up caught in an ever-shrinking time loop which may lead to the destruction of the entire universe.

programme.title: Mentor
programme.desc: Khensu tasks Cleo with mentoring a younger student names Philo. But when he turns out to be just as cocky and brash as Cleo, she gets a taste of her own medicine and develops more respect for Khensu.

programme.title: Eep-Over / Thunkytown
programme.desc: When Eep has the first-ever sleepover, scary noises and shadows send the girls screaming out of the cave; Thunk saves the day when Bear Owls invade.

programme.title: Mom Genes
programme.desc: When Grug takes Ugga hunting to find her inner growl again, she's as fierce as ever until coming face-to-face with a mom and baby too cute to catch.

programme.title: How to Pick Your Dragon
programme.desc: Stoick wants to train his own dragon and enlists Hiccup to help him tame the most ferocious species yet.

programme.title: Portrait of Hiccup as a Buff Man
programme.desc: Believing his father is disappointed in him, Hiccup sets out on a dangerous treasure hunt.

programme.title: Dire Straits
programme.desc: Viggo gets angry at the dragon riders continually interfering with his business and uses a deep sea dragon, the Submaripper, to control Berk's trade.

programme.title: The Longest Day
programme.desc: During the week of the Midnight Sun where the sun doesn't set for a week, Hiccup must deal with sleep deprivation and a dangerous new dragon.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Hiccup and the Riders, with help from Dagur hatch a plan to steal Berk's gold back.

programme.title: The Fumbling of Football Mike
programme.desc: After Boss accidentally sells Tim's favorite Football Mike toy at a family yard sale, he shirks his duties as a CEO to try to get it back. But the villains pick up on his one weakness, his brother, and so begins a game of elaborate keep-away.

programme.title: Teambuilding
programme.desc: The combined villains have taken over Baby Corp HQ, and a disastrous chupie teleportation accident has all the office babies scattered to the wind. Boss has to regain his leadership gusto to convince Baby Corp to regroup, as Tim and Danny share an emotional last day together before Danny leaves town for good.

programme.title: Theo 100
programme.desc: With the Baby Corp babies exiled from their office and hiding in the Templeton basement, Boss and a trusted team storm Baby Corp to take it back from the villains. Having decided to retire and pass the CEO-ship onto to Staci, he also prepares Tim for her new life as an older brother to just a normal baby brother.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Vexing Villainy of the Vile Vimpire
programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Terrifying Perilous Misfortune of the T.P. Mummy
programme.desc: After George and Harold T.P. the entire school with toilet paper, they are forced to flush it all down the toilet causing a giant explosion that turns the French teacher into the T.P. Mummy

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Squishy Predicament of Stanley Peet's Stinky Pits
programme.desc: When George and Harold want to win the school Avocadgrow contest, they accidentally turn their science teacher into a giant avocado monster

programme.title: Out Of The Frying Pan
programme.desc: When the Eruptodon can't take its egg into the Great Volcano, Hiccup and Fishlegs must go into the dangerous volcano with the egg before it's too late.

programme.title: Twintuition
programme.desc: When the Twins journey to the Northern Markets to fix their prized mace, they end up stumbling onto a secret project by Viggo and the Dragon Hunters.

programme.title: Blindsided
programme.desc: A huge storm hits Dragon's Edge causing the Dragons to spook and run off but when Astrid is blinded, Hiccup must lead her to Stormfly.

programme.title: Return of the Four Constellations
programme.desc: The kids go to the Spirit Realm and meet the Original Four Constellations in the hopes of learning how to defeat Jindiao

programme.title: Unholy Dragon Returns to the Mountains
programme.desc: Jindiao takes Po and the kids hostage in an attempt to locate the Wellspring

programme.title: Sacrifice at the Edge of Time
programme.desc: The kids are desperate to get back and help their fellow Panda Villagers, and Po decides he must figure out a way to defeat Jindiao before he controls the world

programme.title: Young Atlas
programme.desc: Jim uses a courage-enhancing "Grit Shaka" to accelerate his training, but nearly gets himself killed when he hunts down Bular and Toby must save him.

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The gang breaks into Stricklers office for clues to Killahead Bridge but ends up releasing a monster into school and Strickler reveals his true form.

programme.title: Claire And Present Danger
programme.desc: Jims Trollhunting life and his high school life collide when Claire becomes a target for Goblin revenge.

programme.title: The Owl Job
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: The Celestial Vault
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Mannat Harr Khushi Paane Ki
programme.desc: Gifted chef Mannat strives for success, unaware her ruthless boss, Aishwarya, is her estranged birth mother, creating a complex and emotional workplace dynamic.

programme.desc: Shawn's rocky pay-streak takes him for a wild ride. Kris raids another claim but a rival dredge fights back. Vernon loses patience with his crew's performance.

programme.title: Spain Seat 600
programme.desc: In Barcelona, Mike and Elvis try to restore a SEAT 600, but an unexpected breakdown and some nasty bills put the boys' profit margin in peril.

programme.title: Sweet Child o' Mining
programme.desc: Shawn gets his first taste of the shifting seabed. Ken tries a new perspective to find new ground.

programme.title: Jaws Vs Leviathan
programme.desc: In New Zealand, a clash of titans is about to erupt: the Great White versus a 60-foot leviathan.

programme.title: Mexico Baja Bug
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis turn a VW Beetle into a Baja Bug for racing across sand dunes. But with just 5 days for the build will their project hit the skids?

programme.title: Mysterious Endings
programme.desc: Did the CIA's mind-control experiments kill one of their own? Did Cleopatra really take her own life? Who was behind the theft of a $160m painting?

programme.title: Take Me To Jail
programme.desc: Mickey loses his grip on the expedition. His questionable motives cause chaos, leading to a kidnapping and a shocking firing.

programme.title: Dredge Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: With a massive storm about to hit Nome, Shawn and Ken push their operations to the brink to get one last score in. Emily gambles on untested ground.

programme.title: Land Rover Discovery
programme.desc: Mike is seduced by a Land Rover Discovery Mk1 with low mileage. But with no MoT, a leaking sunroof and rust problems, Elvis has his work cut out buying parts.

programme.title: Morris Traveller Minor Miracle
programme.desc: Ant and his dad find a "perfect" Woodie but there's a catch. There's no engine! The farmhouse is in danger of collapse due to rotten wooden beams.

programme.title: Rolls Royce Silver Spirit
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis buy a piece of the Champagne lifestyle on a budget: a Silver Spirit that looks past its best. Can they make it turn a profit?

programme.title: Deadliest Car
programme.desc: A new client, Rick Mezich from Deadliest Catch, tests Dave's design prowess on his CF1. Plus, the upholstery shop shows off new processes to streamline the builds.

programme.title: Go Big Or Go Home
programme.desc: Hold on tight for a hilarious rollercoaster of laughs! Dive into action-packed clips filled with big thrills, spills, and countless surprises!

programme.title: Licensed To Thrill
programme.desc: Get ready for edge-of-your-seat laughter! This week's comedy clips push boundaries and guarantee thrills -- no license is required, but buckle up for the ride!

programme.title: All The Smoke Or Going Broke
programme.desc: Matt must turn BBQ smokers into big bucks at a Texas-sized mess in Houston. At a second job, a massive termite infestation could eat the profits.

programme.title: Turkey Anadol Stc16
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis travel to Turkey in search of one of the rarest cars they've ever bought, the Anadol STC16, but the one they find needs major work.

programme.title: Demolition Derby
programme.desc: A chance encounter in Utah escalates from death threats in a parking lot to a demolition derby on the interstate.

programme.title: Shaqs Super Truck
programme.desc: NBA superstar Shaquille O'Neal shows up unannounced at Apocalypse to order a custom 4x4 Juggernaut truck. Frank and Pop go into firefighter training.

programme.title: Fiat 500 The Italian Job
programme.desc: Ant haggles with a 91-year-old Italian Nonna to get a 1970 Fiat 500, but it's full of faults. Plus, Ant tackles the farmhouse floor as costs soar.

programme.title: Toyota Landcruiser
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis tackle a classic Toyota Landcruiser. Mike takes a gamble and imports an original 70s one from Japan, not knowing what state it will arrive in.

programme.title: AUDI Rs6
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis have one of their toughest challenges yet: can they make an Audi RS6 estate car faster than a sportscar? Elvis has doubts after a hazardous test drive.

programme.title: Demolition Derby
programme.desc: A chance encounter in Utah escalates from death threats in a parking lot to a demolition derby on the interstate.

programme.title: 披荆斩棘3
programme.desc: 本季节目以"奋进"为内核，不仅延续了前两季的全景竞演综艺模式，还通过赛制、环节等方面的升级再度强化节目的竞技性。嘉宾们不断挑战、探索，展现男性的奋斗精神和个性魅力。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 星空下的仁医
programme.desc: 二十年前一宗手术，令两名儿科专科实习医生况丛昕（马国明饰）与许甘枫（郑嘉颖饰）决裂。 时日过去，由于一个特殊的移植手术，他们在安妮公主医院重聚。

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。
